user.title: Add Hikvision recorder
user.description:
Enter the recorder connection settings used by Home Assistant to reach the Hikvision NVR/DVR.

Examples:
• Host: 192.168.1.167
• Host: nvr.lan
• HTTPS port: 443
• HTTP port: 80

Recommendations:
• Use the local IP address or DNS name reachable from Home Assistant.
• Leave Verify SSL disabled when the recorder uses the factory self-signed certificate.
• Use an HTTPS port only when HTTPS is enabled on the recorder.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Hikvision recorder
reconfigure.description:
Update the recorder connection settings without removing the integration entry.

Examples:
• Change host from 192.168.1.167 to 192.168.1.200
• Switch from HTTP port 80 to HTTPS port 443
• Update service account credentials after a password change

Recommendations:
• Keep the same recorder reachable from Home Assistant.
• Re-test credentials before saving.
• Enable Verify SSL only when Home Assistant trusts the recorder certificate.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the recorder or complete Hikvision digest authentication.
error.already_configured: Another entry already uses this host and port.

init.title: Debug options
init.description: Enable targeted debug categories for troubleshooting. Use a comma-separated list. Example: playback, isapi, websocket
